package rulecoverage

func NegativeSoftDeleteFiltersWrittenManuallyInManyQueries() string {
    ruleID := "soft_delete_filters_written_manually_in_many_queries"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Repeated `deleted_at IS NULL` style filters rather than a shared repository or scope policy."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
